title: Multi-Actor Workflow, State Machines, and Auditability · Evidence Recall
summary: A delayed review reconstructs multi-actor workflow, state machines, and auditability from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for authorized auditable workflow model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define states, events, guards, actors, effects, notifications, terminal conditions, and invalid transitions in an executable table.
Bind each transition to authenticated role, contextual authorization, separation of duties, and appeal or override evidence.
Specify optimistic, pessimistic, serialized, or conflict-resolution behavior when actors act on stale state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: State Transition Table · changed case · Review State Transition Table
steps.instruction:
review case — Two actors approve and cancel stale copies of one request while a support override bypasses the mutable status field and erases history. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Define states, events, guards, actors, effects, notifications, terminal conditions, and invalid transitions in an executable table.

Which action demonstrates State Transition Table without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: State Transition Table · changed case · Review State Transition Table.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for define states, events, guards, actors, effects, notifications, terminal conditions, and invalid transitions in an executable table. For State Transition Table · changed case · Review State Transition Table, keep State Transition Table connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Two actors approve and cancel stale copies of one request while a support override bypasses the mutable status field and erases history. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Define states, events, guards, actors, effects, notifications, terminal conditions, and invalid transitions in an executable table.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which State Transition Table condition decided your prediction.

options.text: A list of status values defines workflow behavior. That claim fails the state transition table · changed case evidence boundary for State Transition Table.

This does not satisfy State Transition Table for authorized auditable workflow model.

Define states, events, guards, actors, effects, notifications, terminal conditions, and invalid transitions in an executable table. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for authorized auditable workflow model.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Recover interrupted, duplicated, partially completed, or disputed transitions without fabricating history.
